who: hospitality managers in small hotels managing 5–15 rooms
offer: For hospitality managers in small hotels managing 5–15 rooms, inefficient inventory and payroll management causes operational delays. We streamline these processes instead of manual spreadsheets and disparate systems.
problem: inefficient management of inventory and payroll leading to operational delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to hospitality managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try simple inventory tracking and payroll management features
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing data
